hero.subtitle: Michelin Star Restaurant
hero.title: AUREO
hero.description: The art of Italian cuisine in its purest and most refined form

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Since 1987
about.paragraph1: AUREO was born from the passion of two souls: Chef Marco Bellini and sommelier Elena Rossi. In an ancient palace in the historic center, they created a place where Italian culinary tradition meets the boldest innovation.
about.paragraph2: Our philosophy is simple: extraordinary ingredients, treated with respect and mastery. Every dish tells a story — that of Italian lands, the producers we carefully choose, and the patience behind every creation.
about.paragraph3: In 2019, this extreme dedication to quality received the highest recognition: the Michelin Star. For us, it is an honor and a responsibility that drives us every day to exceed our own standards.

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: Seasonal
menu.description: Our menu evolves with the seasons, celebrating products at their peak of perfection.

chef.title: The Chef
chef.subtitle: Marco Bellini
chef.paragraph1: Trained in the most prestigious kitchens in Italy and France, Chef Bellini has developed a unique culinary language that honors Italian tradition through a contemporary lens.
chef.paragraph2: His philosophy rests on three pillars: respect for the ingredient, impeccable technique, and a deep empathy for those seated at our table. Every dish that leaves our kitchen is an invitation to discover something new, within the comfort of flavors that taste like home.
chef.quote: Cooking is the art of transforming the humble into the extraordinary. I never waste anything, because every ingredient has a story to tell.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Visit Us
contact.reservation: Reservations recommended at least 48 hours in advance
